Shoal Signal | Coinbase's x402: Agent Payments, Financial Independence, and Autonomy
W/ Lincoln Murr - AI Product Manager @ Coinbase
> In this episode, we cover x402 and machine payments, Coinbase for Agents, the facilitator layer, why 402 was the internet's missing error code, financial independence before agent autonomy, and where value accrues as agents become the internet's main users.
👇
Source:
https://x.com/Shoalresearch/status/2079276555675828598

tweet.text:
Coinbase's x402: AI Agent Financial Independence, Agent Payments and Autonomy

Shoal Signal with @MurrLincoln, AI Product Manager at @coinbase, hosted by @zaddycoin

We cover x402 and machine payments, Coinbase for Agents, the facilitator layer, why 402 was the internet's missing error code, financial independence before agent autonomy, and where value accrues as agents become the internet's main users.

0:00 Intro and guest background
3:46 What x402 is and error code 402
5:36 The Coinbase stack, buyer and seller
6:43 Coinbase for agents and discovery
8:25 Where the real use cases are
13:47 Pr

convergence.context: 5 posts across 3 channels (ahboyashreads, shoalresearch, muur_posts) — mentioning a16zcrypto, Binance, Coinbase, Bitcoin

sample_posts.text:
Tokenized Stocks Market Diversifies Beyond Crypto as Crypto-Linked Share Falls From 79% to 21% in a Year
Source:
https://x.com/a16zcrypto/status/2079321050765267140

tweet.text:
While the market for tokenized stocks is new, its composition has already changed greatly in the past year.

Crypto-linked products once dominated the market, but their share by market cap has dropped to 21% (as of June) from 79% a year earlier. They have lost the top spot to the "other" category — a long tail of hundreds of smaller listings — that now makes up 35% of the market, up from 15% a year earlier.

The rest of the market is climbing too. Megacap tech — tech companies with a market cap around $100 billion or more — now make up 10.6% of the market by market cap as of June, up from 0.6%

sample_posts.text:
Tokenized Stocks Hit $1.7B Market Cap in June, Up More Than 5× Year Over Year
Source:
https://x.com/a16zcrypto/status/2079289198570520939

tweet.text:
The market cap of tokenized stocks reached about $1.7 billion at the end of June, up from $329 million a year earlier — more than 5x growth. This makes tokenized stocks one of the fastest-growing categories of tokenized assets (which some refer to as real world assets).

Unlike stablecoins, whose circulating supply is a direct proxy for demand — one token, one dollar — tokenized stocks move with their underlying equities, so “market cap” does not cleanly separate the effects of new tokens minted and existing tokens repricing. 

The evidence points to issuance though. More than half of today's

sample_posts.text:
Major exchange stablecoin outflows signal liquidity contraction –
Link
Binance and Bybit saw combined stablecoin outflows of more than $2.3 billion over the past 30 days, including $1.55B from Binance and $786M from Bybit. The steady drain suggests capital is leaving exchanges or being pulled out of positions.
Matters because:
Less stablecoin liquidity can make it harder for Bitcoin to break above consolidation.

SOUTH KOREAN STUDENT LOSES $200,000 IN LEVERAGED TRADING BUT PLANS TO BORROW AND TRY AGAIN

sample_posts.text: Robinhood to Enable AI Agents to Trade Crypto for Eligible U.S. Customers (Coming Soon)  > Eligible US customers will soon be able to connect their AI agent to a dedicated Robinhood account to trade crypto on their behalf.  Source: https://x.com/Robinhood…

tweet.text:
Robinhood is now open to AI agents.

You can open an agentic account and connect an AI agent to it. From there, you can let it research, trade, and manage a portfolio on your behalf.

Here's how to get started. 🧵

sample_posts.text:
Fluidstack Raises $830M Series A at a $7.5B Valuation, Led by Situational Awareness
> Fluidstack builds infrastructure for the leading AI labs, with the aim to be the fastest on the planet at deploying hundreds of gigawatts of compute.
Source:
https://x.com/fluidstack/status/2079250004510728559

tweet.text:
In January, Fluidstack raised an $830M Series A at a $7.5B valuation, led by Situational Awareness, with participation from world-leading investors. 

Fluidstack builds infrastructure for the leading AI labs - our goal is to be the fastest on the planet at deploying hundreds of gigawatts of compute. 

As we stand at the event horizon of the singularity, humanity’s best chance is if democracies, with error correcting institutions, free speech, and checks on power, imbue those same principles into superintelligence. Whoever deploys frontier compute infrastructure fastest will decide whether Al e

sample_posts.text:
Anthropic Offers Up to $50,000 in Claude Credits to Researchers Working on Rare Disease Cures
> Anthropic is accepting applications for its AI for Science program's first thematic call, offering researchers up to $50K in Claude credits over six months to accelerate rare genetic disease research
> The program is for scientists doing basic research, and for early-stage biotechs working on speeding up clinical development for rare diseases.
Source:
https://www.anthropic.com/news/rare-disease-research-grants
